Variables.Name: bActiveNode
Variables.Description:
Engine Modify
	 Enable Node to be ignored at runtime but keep alpha value no change
	 false will ignore (do no or skip) evaluate, but no affect on update

Variables.Name: LODThreshold
Variables.Description:
Max LOD that this node is allowed to run
	 For example if you have LODThreadhold to be 2, it will run until LOD 2 (based on 0 index)
	 when the component LOD becomes 3, it will stop updateevaluate
	 currently transition would be issue and that has to be re-visited
